final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used the most granular recurring interest expense components and excluded broader 'Finance costs' and duplicate/supplemental totals to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: No parent-only equity or non-controlling interest line is visible, so total equity is the best available BE mapping. Both capitalization variants are provided as a priority list for label changes over time.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line is visible on the balance sheet. Since BE uses total equity, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
